nativeProjectLimitation: Cakewalk/Sonar .cwp files are proprietary; this is an import-ready bundle.

tracks.name: Lead Vocal
tracks.notes: Import at bar 1 beat 1. Keep this isolated for mixing.

tracks.name: Bass
tracks.notes: No guitar backing; bass is permitted.

tracks.name: Drums
tracks.recommendedOutput: SI-Drum Kit, Session Drummer, or TTS-1 drums
tracks.notes: Use MIDI channel 10 if your drum synth expects General MIDI drums.

tracks.name: Piano
tracks.recommendedOutput: SI-Electric Piano, TTS-1 piano, or piano VST

tracks.name: Pad
tracks.recommendedOutput: TTS-1 pad/string patch or pad synth
